text.name: ahl_wrongHusbandryType
text.text: This husbandry does not accept this animal type

text.name: ahl_tooOldToPickup
text.text: This animal is too old to pick up

text.name: ahl_tooHeavyToPickup
text.text: This animal is too heavy to pick up

text.name: ahl_notEnoughSpace
text.text: Not enough space in this husbandry for all animals in the trailer

text.name: ahl_function_bucket
text.text: A feed bucket can be used to herd animals towards you.

text.name: ahl_notInHusbandry
text.text: You must be inside a husbandry to start herding.

text.name: ahl_trailerTypeMismatch
text.text: Animals in trailer do not match this husbandry

text.name: ahl_noDog
text.text: You don't have a dog. Purchase one from the store.
